tiles.title: Data Size by Database
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE(database,'unknown') AS database_name, MAX(data_point_value) AS bytes FROM $metrics_dataset WHERE metric_name='mongodb.data.size' AND p_timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '48 hours' GROUP BY database_name ORDER BY bytes DESC

tiles.title: Storage Size by Database
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE(database,'unknown') AS database_name, MAX(data_point_value) AS bytes FROM $metrics_dataset WHERE metric_name='mongodb.storage.size' AND p_timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '48 hours' GROUP BY database_name ORDER BY bytes DESC

tiles.title: Index Size by Database
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE(database,'unknown') AS database_name, MAX(data_point_value) AS bytes FROM $metrics_dataset WHERE metric_name='mongodb.index.size' AND p_timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '48 hours' GROUP BY database_name ORDER BY bytes DESC

tiles.title: Index Count by Database
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE(database,'unknown') AS database_name, MAX(data_point_value) AS indexes FROM $metrics_dataset WHERE metric_name='mongodb.index.count' AND p_timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '48 hours' GROUP BY database_name ORDER BY indexes DESC

tiles.title: Object Count by Database
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE(database,'unknown') AS database_name, MAX(data_point_value) AS objects FROM $metrics_dataset WHERE metric_name='mongodb.object.count' AND p_timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '48 hours' GROUP BY database_name ORDER BY objects DESC

tiles.title: Collection Latency Ops
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT metric_name, MAX(data_point_value)-MIN(data_point_value) AS ops FROM $metrics_dataset WHERE metric_name IN ('mongodb_collstats_latencyStats_reads_ops','mongodb_collstats_latencyStats_writes_ops','mongodb_collstats_latencyStats_commands_ops','mongodb_collstats_latencyStats_transactions_ops') AND p_timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '48 hours' GROUP BY metric_name ORDER BY ops DESC

tiles.title: Replica Set State
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT "server.address" AS server, MAX(data_point_value) AS state FROM $metrics_dataset WHERE metric_name='mongodb_mongod_replset_my_state' AND p_timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '48 hours' GROUP BY "server.address" ORDER BY server

tiles.title: Replication Lag by State
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE(state,'unknown') AS member_state, MAX(data_point_value) AS lag_seconds FROM $metrics_dataset WHERE metric_name='mongodb_mongod_replset_member_replication_lag' AND p_timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '48 hours' GROUP BY COALESCE(state,'unknown') ORDER BY lag_seconds DESC

tiles.title: MongoDB Log Events
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM $logs_dataset WHERE p_timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '48 hours'

tiles.title: Warnings / Errors
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM $logs_dataset WHERE p_timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '48 hours' AND array_element(regexp_match("mongodb.raw", '\"s\":\"([^\"]+)'), 1) IN ('W','E','F')

tiles.title: Logs Over Time
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT date_bin(INTERVAL '1 minute', p_timestamp, TIMESTAMP '1970-01-01T00:00:00') AS time_bucket, COUNT(*) AS logs FROM $logs_dataset WHERE p_timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '48 hours' GROUP BY time_bucket ORDER BY time_bucket

tiles.title: Logs by Severity
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE(array_element(regexp_match("mongodb.raw", '\"s\":\"([^\"]+)'), 1), 'unknown') AS severity, COUNT(*) AS logs FROM $logs_dataset WHERE p_timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '48 hours' GROUP BY severity ORDER BY logs DESC

tiles.title: Logs by Component
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE(array_element(regexp_match("mongodb.raw", '\"c\":\"([^\"]+)'), 1), 'unknown') AS component, COUNT(*) AS logs FROM $logs_dataset WHERE p_timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '48 hours' GROUP BY component ORDER BY logs DESC LIMIT 15

tiles.title: Recent Warning / Error Logs
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT p_timestamp, array_element(regexp_match("mongodb.raw", '\"s\":\"([^\"]+)'), 1) AS severity, array_element(regexp_match("mongodb.raw", '\"c\":\"([^\"]+)'), 1) AS component, array_element(regexp_match("mongodb.raw", '\"msg\":\"([^\"]+)'), 1) AS message, "mongodb.raw" AS raw FROM $logs_dataset WHERE p_timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '48 hours' AND array_element(regexp_match("mongodb.raw", '\"s\":\"([^\"]+)'), 1) IN ('W','E','F') ORDER BY p_timestamp DESC LIMIT 50

tiles.title: Trace Spans
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM $traces_dataset WHERE p_timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '48 hours'

tiles.title: Error Spans
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM $traces_dataset WHERE p_timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '48 hours' AND span_status_code <> 0

tiles.title: Avg Span Duration
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT AVG(span_duration_ns)/1000000 AS value FROM $traces_dataset WHERE p_timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '48 hours'

tiles.title: P95 Span Duration
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT approx_percentile_cont(span_duration_ns, 0.95)/1000000 AS value FROM $traces_dataset WHERE p_timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '48 hours'

tiles.title: Spans Over Time
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT date_bin(INTERVAL '1 minute', p_timestamp, TIMESTAMP '1970-01-01T00:00:00') AS time_bucket, COUNT(*) AS spans FROM $traces_dataset WHERE p_timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '48 hours' GROUP BY time_bucket ORDER BY time_bucket

tiles.title: Spans by DB Operation
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE("db.operation.name", 'unknown') AS operation, COUNT(*) AS spans FROM $traces_dataset WHERE p_timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '48 hours' GROUP BY operation ORDER BY spans DESC

tiles.title: Span Duration by Collection
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE("db.collection.name", 'unknown') AS collection_name, AVG(span_duration_ns)/1000000 AS avg_ms, approx_percentile_cont(span_duration_ns, 0.95)/1000000 AS p95_ms, COUNT(*) AS spans FROM $traces_dataset WHERE p_timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '48 hours' GROUP BY collection_name ORDER BY p95_ms DESC LIMIT 20

tiles.title: Slow MongoDB Trace Queries
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT p_timestamp, "db.namespace" AS database_name, "db.collection.name" AS collection_name, "db.operation.name" AS operation, span_name, span_duration_ns/1000000 AS duration_ms, "db.query.text" AS query_text FROM $traces_dataset WHERE p_timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '48 hours' ORDER BY span_duration_ns DESC LIMIT 50

tiles.title: Metric Inventory
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT metric_name, COUNT(*) AS samples, MIN(p_timestamp) AS first_seen, MAX(p_timestamp) AS last_seen FROM $metrics_dataset WHERE p_timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '48 hours' GROUP BY metric_name ORDER BY samples DESC LIMIT 200

tiles.title: MongoDB Stream Freshness
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT 'mongodb-metrics' AS stream, COUNT(*) AS rows, MIN(p_timestamp) AS first_seen, MAX(p_timestamp) AS last_seen FROM $metrics_dataset UNION ALL SELECT 'mongodb-logs' AS stream, COUNT(*) AS rows, MIN(p_timestamp) AS first_seen, MAX(p_timestamp) AS last_seen FROM $logs_dataset UNION ALL SELECT 'mongodb-traces' AS stream, COUNT(*) AS rows, MIN(p_timestamp) AS first_seen, MAX(p_timestamp) AS last_seen FROM $traces_dataset
